рҹҺҷпёҸ Peter McCormack returns for Part 2, and this one goes far beyond Bitcoin.

We talk about building businesses in Britain, why entrepreneurship now feels like death by a thousand cuts, the broken incentives driving politics, and what it would actually take to restore freedom: life, liberty, property, and real accountability.

Peter explains why running a business pushed him toward libertarian ideas, why heвҖҷs lost faith in todayвҖҷs political class, what a real вҖңUK resetвҖқ could look like, and where Bitcoin fits into the bigger picture, even if it scares people off. item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll вҖ“ The Layer Below the Coin: Architecting a Stablecoin (with AllUnity-CFO/CPO Simon Seiter)
item.description:
In this episode of BFRR (Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвҖҷnвҖҷRoll), co-host Michael Blaschke sits down with Simon Seiter, Managing Director, CFO and CPO of AllUnityвҖ”the regulated stablecoin venture backed by DWS, Galaxy Digital and Flow Traders. Simon brings a rare perspective: he built institutional DLT infrastructure inside one of GermanyвҖҷs oldest private banks, then crossed to the вҖңother sideвҖқ to design the on-chain rails banks will ultimately connect to.

The conversation starts with AllUnityвҖҷs announcement of a Swiss francвҖ“denominated stablecoin alongside its euro productвҖ”not as a headline-grabbing token launch, but as an вҖңinfrastructure signalвҖқ that the platform was built multi-currency from day one. Simon explains why multi-currency matters for corporates, how MiCA enables CHF issuance via the EEA (through Liechtenstein), and why readiness can compress time-to-market.

Then we go вҖңlayer below the coinвҖқ: regulated onboarding, wallet and bank-account whitelisting, virtual IBANs, straight-through processing, and automated minting/redemption in ~4.5 minutes. Simon walks through the full stackвҖ”transaction banking APIs, smart-contract governance and key management, reserve management (cash plus eligible securities with DWS advice), and the compliance and monitoring layer (sanctions screening, on-chain monitoring, travel rule, blacklisting mechanics). We also unpack where TradFi breaks when you bolt on blockchain: the identity-layer mismatch between accounts and addresses, real-time settlement vs. batch reconciliation, and why weekend liquidity can require buffers or smarter banking partnerships.

SimonвҖҷs takeaway for bank CXOs: stop over-strategizingвҖ”build wallet and key-management capability now, run real experiments, and treat on-chain settlement as core infrastructure, not a side project.

Mentioned: Digital Euro Conference 2026 (March 26, Frankfurt / online)вҖ”discount code BFRR20 in the show notes. Not financial advice.

AllUnity just launched a Swiss franc stablecoin alongside its existing euro productвҖ”and while most coverage treats it as a product announcement, this episode treats it as an infrastructure signal. Host Michael Blaschke sits down with Simon Seiter, Managing Director and CFO/CPO at AllUnity, to go layer by layer through the actual technology, partnerships, and design decisions that have to exist beneath a stablecoin before any institutional client will touch it. From onboarding and virtual IBANs to smart contract key management, reserve allocation, and compliance monitoring, Simon walks through the full customer flow and reveals what straight-through processing looks like in practiceвҖ”including the four-and-a-half-minute mint-to-wallet cycle AllUnity has built.

The conversation goes deeper than technology. Simon and Michael dissect where traditional financial architecture genuinely breaks when it meets blockchain: the identity layer mismatch between KYC-based closed account systems and pseudonymous open networks, the reconciliation gap between end-of-day batch processing and real-time atomic settlement, and the challenge of enforcing sanctions in an open transfer system.

Simon draws on his experience building digital asset infrastructure inside Hauck AufhГӨuser Lampe to explain why blacklistingвҖ”rather than whitelistingвҖ”became the necessary bridge between TradFiвҖҷs closed-system paradigm and cryptoвҖҷs open one, and why banks that havenвҖҷt started a wallet infrastructure project at least two years ago have already missed the window to build competitively.

Perhaps most striking is SimonвҖҷs candid assessment of the broader institutional landscape. While banks have formed consortia and announced intentions, he argues that very few have actually shipped anythingвҖ”and that the real bottleneck isnвҖҷt strategy or regulation but the willingness to build and the people who can execute. His advice to any bank CXO listening is blunt: stop theorizing and start experiencing.

Buy wallets the way Kodak should have bought PCs. Give your teams money and time to experiment before commissioning a year-long strategy project. Because the secondary-order consequences of digital moneyвҖ”from pay-per-usage models to the elimination of classical point-of-sale infrastructureвҖ”are business model shifts that no amount of strategic planning will surface without hands-on experience.

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвҖҷnвҖҷRoll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвҖҷnвҖҷRoll Telegram Channel

Michael Blaschke on LinkedIn

Simon Seiter on LinkedIn

Relai*: Buy Bitcoin with RelaiвҖ”you can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвҖҷnвҖҷRoll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Digital Euro Conference: Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвҖҷnвҖҷRoll ist again partnering with the Digital Euro Conference that takes place on March 26, 2026, in Frankfurt. The DEC is one of EuropeвҖҷs leading conferences on the future of money, discussing the digital euro but also the role of stablecoins and tokenized deposits for the future of payments. More information about the DEC, can you found here*. Secure 20% off with the discount code вҖңBFRR20вҖқ.

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own researchвҖ”inform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

]]>

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts вҖ“ Marktupdate #46 | Wer drГјckt Bitcoin nach unten?
item.description:
Markt-Manipulation

Hedge Fonds und Investment Advisors haben laut aktuellen SEC-Unterlagen in Q4 2025 25.000 BTC abgestoГҹen. Mittendrin: Jane Street вҖ“ zweitgrГ¶Гҹter Halter des BlackRock Bitcoin-ETFs und bekannt fГјr den berГјchtigten "10am Slam".

Jetzt steckt die Trading-Firma mitten in einer Insider-Trading-Klage im Zusammenhang mit dem Terra-Luna-Kollaps 2022. Und ausgerechnet am Tag der Berichterstattung: steigt Bitcoin wieder.

Wir analysieren, ob Sam Bankman-Frieds alter Arbeitgeber den Bitcoin-Kurs strukturell unterdrГјckt вҖ“ und warum der Boden trotz schwacher Glassnode-Akkumulationsdaten nГӨher rГјckt als gedacht. AuГҹerdem: Live-Charts BTC, CRCL und ZEC

рҹ’Ў Themen dieser Folge:

рҹ•ҷ Der вҖң10am-SlamвҖқ Ist diese Trading-Firma aufgeflogen?

рҹ”— Onchain-Indikatoren Der Bitcoin-Boden ist nah, aber noch nicht erreicht.

рҹ“Ҡ Chartanalyse: Heute live: Circle (CRCL) steigt nach positiven Quartalsergebnissen und warum ZEC jetzt gГјnstig ist.

Werde Teil der BTC-ECHO-Community auf Telegram: https://t.me/btcechochat

Willst du den Podcast als Video sehen? Dann schau auf unseren YouTube-Kanal vorbei https://youtube.com/live/QLhg4vI5TYc

Entdecke jetzt alle weiteren Angebote von BTC-ECHO:

рҹ“ұ App: https://onelink.to/hs4a9zutmsource=audio&utmmedium=podcast&utmcampaign=okrapppromo&utmcontent=okr

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вҖ“ Guy's Take_104 - The User Doesn't Care About Your Mission
item.description:
The biggest mistake Bitcoin and sovereignty-focused developers keep making is trying to sell people on why they care instead of building something people actually want to use. They don't care about decentralization, sovereignty, or peer-to-peer - they care about things that work.

Looking at the user experience tells us just how far we still need to go. Why does logging into a free service feel like a hostage negotiation? Why are captchas filling every corner of the web when bots are better at solving them than humans? Is KYC and a credit card to every single service we want to login to really the "better experience" that the future holds for us? And why in 2026, sharing and syncing files between your own devices and among friends still migraine inducing? It's time to work backward from the web we want to have, to find the tools that will get us there.

References from the episode

- Pear Drive GitHub repository (Link: https://github.com/peardrive)

- Pears, open-source P2P development stack by Holepunch (Link: https://pears.com/)

- Pubky, key-oriented web protocol for user-owned identity and data by Synonym (Link: https://pubky.app/)

- Wormhole, end-to-end encrypted file sharing tool via links (Link: https://wormhole.app/)

- RustDesk, open-source remote desktop software (Link: https://rustdesk.com/)

- Nostr, key-based identity protocol for global social networking and messaging (Link: https://nostr.org/)

- Breeze SDK with Statechains: Non-custodial Bitcoin scaling solution for onboarding Lightning payments without liquidity concerns (Link: https://breez.technology/sdk/)

- Dead Internet Theory: concept referenced regarding bot-dominated online interactions (Link: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dead_Internet_theory)

- BitTorrent history: its peak traffic era (~2006вҖ“2007) and lessons on peer-to-peer adoption (Link: https://www.bittorrent.org/)

- The Cold Start Problem by Andrew Chen: a book on network effects and the atomic network concept (Link: https://www.amazon.com/Cold-Start-Problem-Andrew-Chen/dp/0062969749)

- Steve Jobs' talk on starting from the user experience and working backward to the technology (Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EZll3dJ2AjY)

Check out our awesome sponsors!

  • HRF: The Human Rights Foundation is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that promotes and protects human rights globally, with a focus on closed societies. Subscribe to HRF's Financial Freedom Newsletter today. (Link: https://mailchi.mp/hrf.org/financial-freedom-newsletter)
  • OFF: The Oslo Freedom Forum is a global human rights event by the Human Rights Foundation (HRF), uniting voices from activism, journalism, tech, and beyond. Through powerful stories and collaboration, OFF advances freedom and human potential worldwide. Join us next June. (Link: https://oslofreedomforum.com/)

Host Links

  • вҒ Guy on Nostr вҒ (Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • вҒ Guy on X вҒ (Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • вҒ Bitcoin Audible on XвҒ  (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)
]]>

- Breeze SDK with Statechains: Non-custodial Bitcoin scaling solution for onboarding Lightning payments without liquidity concerns (Link: https://breez.technology/sdk/)

- Dead Internet Theory: concept referenced regarding bot-dominated online interactions (Link: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dead_Internet_theory)

- BitTorrent history: its peak traffic era (~2006вҖ“2007) and lessons on peer-to-peer adoption (Link: https://www.bittorrent.org/)

- The Cold Start Problem by Andrew Chen: a book on network effects and the atomic network concept (Link: https://www.amazon.com/Cold-Start-Problem-Andrew-Chen/dp/0062969749)

- Steve Jobs' talk on starting from the user experience and working backward to the technology (Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EZll3dJ2AjY)

Check out our awesome sponsors!

  • HRF: The Human Rights Foundation is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that promotes and protects human rights globally, with a focus on closed societies. Subscribe to HRF's Financial Freedom Newsletter today. (Link: https://mailchi.mp/hrf.org/financial-freedom-newsletter)
  • OFF: The Oslo Freedom Forum is a global human rights event by the Human Rights Foundation (HRF), uniting voices from activism, journalism, tech, and beyond. Through powerful stories and collaboration, OFF advances freedom and human potential worldwide. Join us next June. (Link: https://oslofreedomforum.com/)

Host Links

  • вҒ Guy on Nostr вҒ (Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • вҒ Guy on X вҒ (Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • вҒ Bitcoin Audible on XвҒ  (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)
]]>

Avec Bascar, on explore la logique sacrificielle de RenГ© Girard, les limites de la dГ©mocratie, le rГҙle des religions dans l'Г©mergence de l'individualisme et les clГ©s d'une coexistence non sacrificielle.в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬ QUI SOMMES-NOUS ? в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬Nous sommes 2 partisans de la libertГ© souhaitant sГ©parer la monnaie de l'Etat grГўce Г  Bitcoin. Nous proposons une interview et une vidГ©o d'analyse ou tutoriel par semaine ainsi que des articles tech et Г©conomiques sur https://howtobitcoin.fr/в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬ SOMMAIRE в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬00:00 вҖ“ Introduction et contexte05:52 вҖ“ Qu'est-ce que le droit naturel ?08:18 вҖ“ Droit naturel en pratique : Bitcoin, entrepreneuriat, expatriation11:06 вҖ“ Christianisme et naissance de l'individualisme20:16 вҖ“ RenГ© Girard et la logique sacrificielle43:00 вҖ“ Panorama des religions monothГ©istes55:28 вҖ“ Tradition, identitГ© et niveaux de rГ©alitГ©1:32:35 вҖ“ DГ©mocratie, hyperrГ©alitГ© et franc-maГ§onnerie2:07:36 вҖ“ L'anarcho-capitalisme est-il une utopie ?в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬ NOUS SUIVRE в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬Site Officiel : https://howtobitcoin.frPodcast : https://creators.spotify.com/pod/profile/howtobitcoin/episodes/Twitter/X : https://x.com/howtobitcoin_frInstagram : https://www.instagram.com/howtobitcoinв–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬ INFOS SUPPLEMENTAIRES в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬ #BTC #bitcoin #htb

]]>

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin вҖ“ To The Unknown Pod Episode 35 - The End (Of The Year) Is Nigh
item.description:
In this episode of To The Unknown Pod, Jordan Bush and Ryan Finlay discuss the latest updates from TGFB Media, including the release of their new children's book, The Orange Umbrella, and the upcoming TGFB conference in Fort Worth on April 9.

They share personal reflections on family time during the holidays, the importance of unplugging from online drama, and the challenges of the Bitcoin market. The conversation also touches on New Year's resolutions, family reviews, and the significance of community engagement in their mission to help Christians understand Bitcoin.

]]>

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin вҖ“ Bald in Bitcoin вҖ“ Folge 7: Ruhig bleiben, wenn Bitcoin fГӨllt
item.description:
Worum gehtвҖҷs in dieser Folge?

Wenn Bitcoin fГӨllt, wird es emotional: Angst, Unsicherheit, das GefГјhl вҖһIch muss irgendwas tunвҖң. Genau da passieren die teuersten Fehler. In Folge 7 bekommst du ein einfaches, alltagstaugliches Panikprotokoll, mit dem du in ruhigen Schritten wieder klar denken kannst.

Das nimmst du mit

вҖ“ warum RГјcksetzer normal sind (und was ein Drawdown ist) вҖ“ typische Trigger: Schlagzeilen, rote Zahlen, Social Media, вҖһTippsвҖң von anderen вҖ“ ein Panikprotokoll in 3 Schritten: Stop вҶ’ Fakten вҶ’ Plan вҖ“ kleine DisziplinвҖ‘Helfer: MiniвҖ‘Journal, 24hвҖ‘Regel, BuddyвҖ‘Check

Begriff der Woche: Drawdown

Ein Drawdown beschreibt, wie stark der Kurs vom letzten Hoch zurГјckgeht. Das hilft dir, RГјcksetzer besser einzuordnen вҖ“ ohne Drama.

в”Җв”Җв”Җ

Links & Kontakt

Podcast: https://bald-in-bitcoin.podigee.io/ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=UUu2Xr5bVULqt60DgXRD8zAA Kontakt: lossmerhoddle@protonmail.com

в”Җв”Җв”Җ

Disclaimer

Hinweis: Dieser Podcast dient der Bildung und Information und ist keine Finanzberatung. Ich teile Einordnungen und Erfahrungen вҖ“ du triffst deine Entscheidungen selbst.

]]>

item.title: Australian Bitcoin Podcast вҖ“ ABP | EPISODE 106 | TAXED TO PROSPERITY
item.description:
ABP | EPISODE 106 | TAXED TO PROSPERITYJoin DJ + Mike + Anja to discuss:

- Don't Worry, Be Happy- Taxing Michael Jordan Basket Ball Cards- Honest Money- Heaps More

- -


In this episode of the Australian Bitcoin Podcast, the hosts discuss the current state of the Bitcoin market, including price action, market sentiment, and the impact of FUD related to the Epstein files. They delve into the implications of unrealized capital gains tax, particularly on the middle class, and explore the potential benefits of regulatory measures in the crypto market. The conversation also touches on the growing role of AI in the tech supply chain and the importance of community building within the Bitcoin space, especially regarding the inclusion of women in the movement. Anya, the guest from the Honest Money Show, shares insights on her podcast and the upcoming Byron Bay Bash, emphasising the need for education and adoption in the Bitcoin community.

- -

- Don't Worry, Be Happy- Taxing Michael Jordan Basket Ball Cards- Honest Money- Heaps More

- -


In this episode of the Australian Bitcoin Podcast, the hosts discuss the current state of the Bitcoin market, including price action, market sentiment, and the impact of FUD related to the Epstein files. They delve into the implications of unrealized capital gains tax, particularly on the middle class, and explore the potential benefits of regulatory measures in the crypto market. The conversation also touches on the growing role of AI in the tech supply chain and the importance of community building within the Bitcoin space, especially regarding the inclusion of women in the movement. Anya, the guest from the Honest Money Show, shares insights on her podcast and the upcoming Byron Bay Bash, emphasising the need for education and adoption in the Bitcoin community.

item.title: Beyond Bitcoin Community вҖ“ Worbli Talks - WORBLI Tech And EOSIO - With Robert Dewilder WORBLI Co - Founder And CTO
item.description:
<![CDATA[An interview with WORBLI CTO (Chief Technical Officer) on the technology that WORBLI is built on, some of the advantages it has as it relates to the financial industry and some of the upcoming things we can expect from WORBLI.
WORBLI is a financial services district where enterprises and individuals can access a broad range of services that are built on WORBLI's blockchain. Our blockchain ecosystem leverages EOSIO software and is capable of hosting a variety of decentralized applications (dApps) focused on financial innovation, free transactions, security, reliability, and compliance.
To summarize the current challenge; crypto presents a very high barrier to entry and a lot of red tape for consumers and businesses, and WORBLI is here to resolve this.
Don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel and like this video here: вҳқпёҸрҹ‘Қ
https://youtu.be/XJ27KLKpviY
Come join the discussion with Worbli on our telegram at https://t.me/worblicommunity

item.title: The Bitcoin Boomers вҖ“ From Lobbying to Tech, Princess Diana to Ronald Reagan, Fiat to Bitcoin with John Heubusch
item.description:
Our guest John Heubusch: Went on a date with Princess Diana. Oversaw the legacy of a US President, Ronald Reagan at the request of Nancy Reagan, Wrote a best selling thriller, The Shroud Conspiracy, Chief of Staff at Gateway Computers, Then, he asks us about Bitcoin. Amazing experiences! Find out where he found the missing vial of Reagan's blood.

Find out why he didn't get in to Bitcoin right away. @GaryLeland @boomer_btc @LawrenceLepard @JHeubusch

Listen to The Bitcoin Boomers @BTCsessions Youtube channel or your favorite podcast app:

 BTC Sessions: youtube.com/playlist?list=вҖҰ

рҹҚҺ Apple Podcasts: podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/theвҖҰ

вҡЎ Fountain: fountain.fm/show/kHBRZl0MbвҖҰ

рҹҹў Spotify: open.spotify.com/episode/1A915zвҖҰ

Follow our hosts:

рҹҰ¶ Bob Burnett: x.com/boomer_btc

рҹҺҹпёҸ Gary Leland: x.com/GaryLeland

рҹ“ҳ Lawrence Lepard: x.com/LawrenceLepard

Bitcoin #Podcast

Meet Your Hosts Gary Leland вҖ“ Founder of BitBlockBoom, early digital pioneer, Hall of Fame podcaster. Gary built a few of the earliest e-commerce sites in 1996 and became one of the worldвҖҷs first podcasters in 2004. His work earned recognition in Time MagazineвҖҷs 50 Coolest Websites and induction into the Academy of Podcasters Hall of Fame. He founded BitBlockBoom, the longest-running Bitcoin conference in North America, and has become a trusted educator for people looking to understand Bitcoin without confusion or hype.

Lawrence Lepard вҖ“ Macro investor, sound money advocate, author of The Big Print can be found here- https://amzn.to/3XuzAtn Lawrence brings four decades of experience in venture capital, private equity, and macro analysis. He speaks openly about inflation, debt cycles, monetary failure, and the fragility of the fiat system. His clear, grounded approach helps viewers understand the financial environment shaping todayвҖҷs economy вҖ” and why Bitcoin is a necessary alternative.

Bob Burnett вҖ“ Tech veteran, mining entrepreneur, former CTO at Gateway Bob spent 13 years as CTO and EVP of Products at Gateway, helping lead innovation in personal computing. Today he runs Barefoot Mining, building diversified, decentralized Bitcoin mining sites across the U.S. Bob brings deep expertise on mining, energy, infrastructure, and the technical future of Bitcoin. Why Bitcoin Boomers Matters

]]>

item.title: 21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast вҖ“ Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 вҖ“ Ein GesprГӨch Гјber Banken IT und Bitcoin BГјcher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbststГӨndig in der Beratung fГјr Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er frГјh den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem GesprГӨch erzГӨhlt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman Гјber Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erfГӨhrst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zunГӨchst wieder verkaufte und spГӨter mit vГ¶llig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten SelbststГӨndigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 BegrГјГҹung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 VerГӨnderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die SelbststГӨndigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman Гјber Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps fГјr Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug fГјr ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich mГ¶chte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu beschГӨftigen.

Hier kannst Du Teil der Community werden und mich kontaktieren:

Telegram Community: вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ t.me/B21FocusвҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ В

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse вҖ“ Crypto Outlook 2026
item.description:
In this episode of the Verified Podcast by Bitcoin Suisse, Dominic Weibel sits down with investment strategist DenisВ Oevermann, crypto market analyst LucaВ Gnos, and junior portfolio manager Mateo Sansonetti to dissect crypto's performance in 2025 and share their predictions for 2026.В 
В 
The discussion examines why 2025 was a year where crypto overdelivered on fundamentals but underdelivered on price. The panel explores new regulatory frameworks, the pro-crypto stance of the U.S. administration, and the disjointed performance between Bitcoin and altcoins. They analyze the explosive growth of options trading, the rise of prediction markets, and how macroeconomic factors and institutional flows will shape 2026.В 
В 
The conversation also tackles AI's market influence, the potential for Federal Reserve rate cuts, retail sentiment versus institutional positioning, and price predictions for Bitcoin and Ethereum heading into the new year.

]]>

item.title: Crypto Basic Podcast: Teaching You The Basics of Bitcoin and the World of Cryptocurrency. CryptoBasic вҖ“ Episode 248 - Defi Rundown - The Lost Episode
item.description:
Decentralized Finance: The future of cryptocurrency. It's time for Karim and spearhead the CryptoBasic breakdown of this space in the longest episode that CryptoBasic has ever recorded.


We go over everything from Liquidity Farming, to Rug Pulls, and more.


This episode spent nearly 6 months on the shelf. It's something of a swan song for the CryptoBasic team as they just couldn't keep the project afloat without sacrificing their morals.

item.title: BTC-ECHO Recap | Top-Stories zu Bitcoin & KryptowГӨhrungen вҖ“ Wir sind umgezogen!
Epicenter - Learn about Crypto, Blockchain, Ethereum, Bitcoin and Distributed Technologies вҖ“ Agentic AI Takes Crypto to the Next Level?
item.description:
In this episode, host Friederike Ernst is joined by John Paller, founder of ETH Denver, to reflect on nine seasons of North America's largest Ethereum gathering and where the ecosystem goes next. John shares his "red pill" moment in 2016 and the subsequent realization that Ethereum was not just a corporate efficiency tool, but a way to rewire the global economic system. He discusses the evolution of the Biddle meme and how ETH Denver has become a market-driven aggregator for crypto's shifting narratives, from DeFi summer to the current era of institutional adoption.


They delve into a candid critique of the Ethereum FoundationвҖҷs "Infinite Garden" philosophy, with John arguing for more "structural vision" and actionable roadmaps to compete with the aggressive narratives of chains like Solana. The conversation highlights Agentic AI as the ultimate "Trojan Horse" for mass adoption, enabling a future where users interact with sovereign bots rather than complex private keys. Finally, John explains his Regulation Membership proposal to the US Congress, aiming to provide a federal securities exemption for on-chain cooperatives and restore true economic agency to the "little man."


Topics

  • 00:00 Intro & Context
  • 04:15 Recruitment Tech to Ethereum: JohnвҖҷs Genesis Story
  • 09:30 Inventing the "Biddle" Meme at Denver 2018
  • 15:00 Is Ethereum a "Neo Casino" or a Settlement Layer?
  • 21:45 Critiquing Idealism: The Infinite Garden vs. Reality
  • 27:10 Why Solana is Not "Sufficiently Decentralized
  • 35:20 Agentic AI: The End of signing Transactions manually
  • 42:15 The Roman Catholic Church & Institutional Co-opting
  • 49:00 German Cooperative Culture & On-Chain Credit Unions
  • 55:30 Regulation Membership & The SEC Challenge
  • 59:45 Zero Knowledge Identity & Privacy Rights


Links

  • John Paller on X: https://x.com/PallerJohn
  • ETH Denver: https://www.ethdenver.com/
  • Opolis: https://opolis.co/
  • Lido: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter
  • NEAR: https://near.ai/

Sponsors:


1. Lido V3 introduces stVaults: modular staking infrastructure that lets builders and institutions deploy custom staking vaults, while staying anchored to stETH as a shared liquidity layer. Get started building with Lido V3 today: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter


2. NEAR AI Cloud now lets developers deploy OpenClawвҖ”the rapidly growing open-source AI agent platformвҖ”inside Trusted Execution Environments, providing hardware-level encryption with cryptographic attestations. With OpenClaw on NEAR AI Cloud, you can run agents with cloud convenience, but without traditional cloud data exposure. No hardware to manage. No trust assumptions required. Learn more at near.ai.

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast вҖ“ British HODL: Bitcoin Hitting $340K THIS Year (Why Saylor Keeps Buying & You're PANICKED)
item.description:
рҹ”Ҙ British HODL just predicted Bitcoin hitting $340,000 this year and called out Bitcoiners for "shitting themselves" while institutions stack sats. Here's why the gold & silver PsyOp took your Bitcoin and what's coming next.

In this Bitcoin Treasuries exclusive, British HODL reveals:

вң… Why $340K Bitcoin is coming in 2026 (Вұ15%) - and the liquidity cycle that gets us there
рҹ’° The "Gonadal Model" that's 100% accurate: Bigger zeal = Better Bitcoin returns
рҹ“Ҡ How private banks are offering $100M IBIT financing deals at 50% LTV (central bank + 70bps)
рҹҺҜ The master PsyOp: Gold & silver rallied to take your Bitcoin - then silver dumped 41% in one day
вҡЎ Why IBIT holders have 94% HODL rate while small wallets panic-sold everything
рҹҡЁ MSTR's preferreds will be wrapped by banks and sold as their own products (coming soon)
рҹ’Һ Kevin Warsh = "Who wants to lower rates the most?" (That's how Fed chair was selected)

THE GAME-CHANGING INSIGHT:
British HODL explains why "Bitcoin must rally" - not hopium, but math. Private bankers told him directly: "If Bitcoin only generates 16% CAGR but continues 50-80% drawdowns, we can't expose clients in size." Translation: Bitcoin HAS to deliver massive upside to justify the volatility. Otherwise institutions stay at 1% allocation forever. The ISM breaking 50 after 40 months, $8-10 trillion refinancing this year, and Kevin Warsh lowering rates = perfect setup for $340K.

KEY MOMENTS:
00:00 Intro To British HODL
01:37 Bitcoiner's Conviction Is Horrible This Cycle
04:56 The Retail Era Of Bitcoin Is OVER
07:46 HODL's Hilarious GONADAL Model & Why Bitcoin Must Go Up
10:31 The Psy-Op That Made Bitcoiners Sell Their Bitcoin
15:38 Gold & Silver Rallies Show BTC Can Easily Triple Overnight
20:04 New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh Is Bullish For Bitcoin
21:19 Fear, FOMO, Gold & Jeffrey Epstein FUD
26:18 Saylor's Pivot To Preferred Equities
31:44 Why We Got Rekt On Bitcoin Treasury Trades
37:08 Building A Bitcoin Treasury Company That Will Last
39:26 Do Bitcoin Treasuries Learn or EARN Conviction?
40:54 Bitcoin to $340k & Central Bank Tricks
47:26 Packaging Bitcoin For The Wealthy
54:06 Stay Orange

BEST QUOTES:
рҹ’Һ "Everyone is bullish on Bitcoin besides Bitcoiners. Make that make any sense." - British HODL
вҡ пёҸ "The gold & silver PsyOp was a master stroke. They convinced you Bitcoin was wrong, you sold, then silver dumped 41% in a day. Structural issues my ass." - British HODL
рҹ”Ҙ "Your conviction is earned, never learned. Saylor earned it. These new treasury companies borrowed it from him. Now they're having to earn it." - British HODL

MSTR STRATEGY DEEP DIVE:

Preferreds (STRC/SATA) = foundation for continued accumulation
Banks will wrap STRC and offer it as their own product to clients
Takes time for compliance, training, institutional understanding
Saylor is educating banks/countries while building the products they'll use
Long-term shareholders understand: Speculative platform on top of Bitcoin
If Bitcoin +10%, MSTR must go +15%. If Bitcoin -10%, MSTR -15%. That's the value.

рҹҺҷпёҸ Featured Guest:
British HODL - Bitcoin educator, content creator, and conviction merchant. Known for calling out retail weakness and reading institutional signals.
Follow British HODL: https://twitter.com/@BritishHodl
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@UCBGncGsI7pIDP64RYoM6rEgВ 

рҹӨқ SUPPORT OUR SHOW:
COLDCARD is the industry-leading hardware wallet. Secure your Bitcoin at https://store.coinkite.com. Use referral code 6BT to get 6% off at checkout!

рҹ”— Resources:
рҹ”” Follow Bitcoin Treasuries: https://twitter.com/@BTCtreasuries
рҹ”” Follow Tyler: https://twitter.com/@TylerCompiler
рҹ”” Subscribe: https://youtube.com/@BitcoinTreasuriesNet

рҹҺ¬ About the Show:
Bitcoin Treasuries with Tyler Rowe interviews executives, investors, and industry leaders navigating the Bitcoin treasury revolution.

вҡ пёҸ Disclaimer: This podcast is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

Is British HODL right about $340K Bitcoin this year? рҹ‘Ү

]]>
